passed_scoped_phases: Phase 02P nuclear pore complexes and gate cores
repeated_issues: Source-art components can pass scoped Blender review while still needing Roblox LOD and material simplification.
Reference-board composition remains useful but should get a final layout pass after all nucleus parts exist.
Teaching overlays and context layers must become toggleable in Roblox.
current_quality_notes: Rough ER connection was iterated after an initial failed render; final source art is smaller, smoother, outside the envelope, and does not block the nucleus inspection view.
A follow-up polish pass added dark cisterna lips, lumen ribbons, and denser ribosome placement to reduce the smooth-sheet/toy risk.
Rough ER is approved only as scoped source art, with explicit polish debt around export-only LOD grouping and Roblox material validation.
No full-nucleus approval has been issued yet.
recommended_next_phase: Phase 08M Mitosis_Fragments only: hidden membrane shards and reassembly sockets for nuclear envelope breakdown/reassembly, without changing the default intact nucleus.
